# Origin Configuration File
# Format: hostname json-config
# Lines starting with # are comments
# Note: The 'id' field will be auto-generated as a UUID and injected into the origin config

# Proxy to Hacker News - Full configuration
api.soapbucket.com {"hostname":"api.soapbucket.com","type":"proxy","config":{"url":"https://news.ycombinator.com","timeout":"30s","maxConnections":100,"rateLimit":1000,"burstLimit":2000,"flushInterval":"100ms","idleConnTimeout":"90s","tlsHandshakeTimeout":"10s","dialTimeout":"30s","keepAlive":"30s"}}

# Forward hostname configuration for specific port
api.soapbucket.com:8443 {"hostname":"api.soapbucket.com:8443","type":"proxy","forwardHostname":"api.soapbucket.com","config":{"url":"https://api.soapbucket.com","timeout":"60s"}}

# Local development proxy to example.com
localhost:8443 {"hostname":"localhost:8443","type":"proxy","config":{"url":"https://example.com","timeout":"30s","maxConnections":50,"flushInterval":"100ms"}}

# Example with ForceSSL enabled - redirects HTTP to HTTPS
secure.example.com {"hostname":"secure.example.com","type":"proxy","forceSSL":true,"config":{"url":"https://backend.example.com","timeout":"30s","maxConnections":100}}

# Additional examples (commented out)
# Backend proxy with custom settings
# api.backend.com {"hostname":"api.backend.com","type":"proxy","config":{"url":"https://backend-server.internal","timeout":"45s","maxConnections":200,"rateLimit":500,"skipTLSVerifyHost":false}}

# CDN proxy with caching optimizations
# cdn.example.com {"hostname":"cdn.example.com","type":"proxy","config":{"url":"https://cdn.cloudfront.net","timeout":"20s","idleConnTimeout":"120s","maxConnections":500}}
